error_signature: Syntax error or can't find path
title: SSH path issues when connecting to Windows 11 from n8n
symptom: When attempting to SSH into a Windows 11 machine from n8n, users encounter 'Syntax error' or 'can't find path' messages.
applies_when: Connecting to a Windows 11 Pro machine
not_this_if: SSH works from Linux to Windows
Using a different shell or terminal
root_cause: n8n's SSH node may default to using cmd as the terminal, which can lead to path syntax issues when connecting to Windows. The correct shell for SSH connections to Windows is PowerShell, which handles paths differently.
fix_steps: Restart the SSH service with: Restart-Service sshd.
agent_instruction: Set the OpenSSH default shell to PowerShell and restart the SSH service.
